title: Leading & Managing The Whole New Self - MOVING FORWARD
subtitle: A 2-day HRD Corp-claimable leadership workshop for building practical leading & managing the whole new self - moving forward habits at work.
whyThisMatters: Leading & Managing The Whole New Self - MOVING FORWARD helps supervisors, managers, and team leads turn leading & managing the whole new self - moving forward into clearer expectations, better conversations, and practical follow-through. Participants work through Digital Skills Foundations, Core Tools and Practical Workflows, and Hands-On Workplace Application so they can lead people and workplace change with more confidence.
builtFor: High-potential employees preparing for wider responsibility
Teams that need stronger people-management habits
walkAwayWith: Clarify expectations and leadership responsibilities in practical workplace terms.
Use structured conversations to guide performance and accountability.
Strengthen confidence when influencing, coaching, or supporting others.
Build action steps that can be applied immediately after the workshop.
methodologyCaption: Short facilitator inputs are balanced with discussion, reflection, and practical activities so participants can connect the ideas to real workplace situations.
sourceDoc: course/documents-markdown/Leading & Managing The Whole New Self - MOVING FORWARD.md
